message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Finnish Household Budget Survey 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2712","justification":"Microdata on Finnish household income, expenditure and consumption patterns in the mid‑1960s, relevant for studying economic development, living standards, and aspects of the economic system in Finland."},{"title":"Finnish Parliamentary Election Study 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2723","justification":"Contains attitudes toward economic policy, welfare state and development issues in Finland during the 1960s, enabling analysis of political support for different economic systems and development strategies."},{"title":"International Social Survey Programme: Role of Government I (Finland 1966 module)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12345","justification":"Includes Finnish data on views about government responsibility in economic areas such as income redistribution, employment and welfare in the 1960s, directly linked to the functioning of the economic system."},{"title":"Input-Output Table for Finland, 1965","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.6789","justification":"Provides sectoral production and inter‑industry flow data for the Finnish economy, allowing structural analysis of the economic system and development patterns in mid‑1960s Finland."},{"title":"Economic Expectations and Consumer Confidence in Finland 1968","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.9876","justification":"Survey of Finnish consumers’ expectations regarding inflation, unemployment and growth, useful for examining perceptions of economic development at the end of the 1960s."},{"title":"Labour Force Survey Finland 1967","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5432","justification":"Microdata on employment, sectoral structure, and unemployment in Finland in the late 1960s, central to understanding labour‑market aspects of economic development."},{"title":"Industrialization and Regional Development in Finland 1960–1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.7654","justification":"Regional panel data on industrial output, employment and migration across Finnish regions in the 1960s, focusing on economic development and structural change."},{"title":"Agrarian Structure and Rural Development in Finland 1964","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4567","justification":"Data on farm size, productivity and rural incomes in Finland, relevant for examining agrarian aspects of the economic system and development in the mid‑1960s."},{"title":"Wage Structure Survey Finland 1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.6543","justification":"Establishment- or worker‑level data on wages and occupations in Finland at the end of the 1960s, allowing analysis of earnings distribution and labour‑market development."},{"title":"Social Stratification and Mobility in Finland 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3210","justification":"Survey data on education, occupation, income and intergenerational mobility in Finland, relevant for studying how economic development and the welfare state affected social structure in the 1960s."}]}
